body_txt: Cultures do not evolve identically. Even ones with similar backgrounds and languages have something they disagree about, and it just gets worse the more alien the two cultures are. Naturally, this has great potential for writers who want to introduce conflict to the plot, or just want to show off their worldbuilding skill. Some tropes associated with Culture Clash: See Values Dissonance , for when this happens to the audience. Also see Crazy Cultural Comparison , a milder form of Culture Clash played for laughs. There is also Pop-Culture Isolation . Often an element of Fantastic Racism .
